_note: Real, operator-curated Polecat examples for the public website (kevinrhaas/polecat) carousel. Each shows the prompt, a few DIFFERING model takes, and the synthesized consensus. The site should render these as uniform, brand-matched cards (same frame/aspect/dark theme) — NOT raw screenshots. Auto-rotate, pause on hover, swipeable on mobile, respect reduced-motion. Drop the old standalone 'baking soda' example; keep the cooking one (#cooking).

examples.prompt: What's the secret to extra-crispy roast potatoes?

takes.pick: Parboil with baking soda — a 'game-changer' for craggy edges
Parboil + rough-up + hot fat; baking soda optional
Starchy potato, parboil, shake to roughen, duck/goose fat, scorching pan

examples.consensus: Starchy potato → parboil → rough up the edges → very hot fat. Baking soda is optional (raises pH for crispier edges).

examples.prompt: What is the most significant event in US history? You can choose only one.
examples.consensus: The American Civil War (1861–65) — with the nation's founding a close, defensible alternative.

examples.prompt: What's the all-time best Beatles song? You can choose only one.
examples.consensus: 'A Day in the Life' — the band's artistic peak; 'Hey Jude' / 'Yesterday' win on popularity.

examples.prompt: What's the best first programming language to learn in 2026?

takes.pick: Python all-rounder; TypeScript for web; Rust for performance

examples.consensus: Python overall; JavaScript/TypeScript if you're web-focused, Swift/Kotlin for mobile. (Rare strong agreement — trust it.)

examples.prompt: Most underrated, inexpensive, best-value, most-fun travel spot? You can choose only one.
examples.consensus: Da Nang, Vietnam — beach + city + food + nature at very low cost (Tbilisi & the Azores are great wildcards).

examples.prompt: Who is the single greatest athlete of all time?

takes.pick: No single answer — depends on the criteria
Jordan, Ali, Serena, Bolt, Pelé… (8 contenders)

examples.consensus: No objective GOAT; if forced, Jim Thorpe for all-around ability — Jordan, Ali, Serena, Bolt, Phelps, Messi/Pelé & more remain defensible by other measures.
